allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add pre-workshop flows with database integration and static fallbacks

- Implement lazy database initialization from server context
- Add workshop creation wizard with access code generation
- Add join workshop flow with code-based authentication
- Store generated codes in session for consistency
- Add pre-workshop views for facilitators and contributors
- Gracefully fall back to static codes (FAC123/CON123) when DB unavailable
- Contributors always route to input form regardless of workshop status
- Update CLAUDE.md with comprehensive workflow documentation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update CLAUDE.md with comprehensive pre-workshop and post-workshop documentation

- Document complete workshop lifecycle: pre-workshop, live, and post-workshop phases
- Add pre-workshop phase: create workshop, join flow, contributor/facilitator views
- Add live workshop phase: data model, API routes, real-time SSE, terminology
- Add post-workshop phase: AI summary generation, stack ranking, contributor views
- Include database schema for all three phases
- Document AI summary structure and ranking formula
- Add error handling patterns for database fallback modes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
